name: Jericho Ichabod - Crowe
description:
hii, just putting this here since this is my most popular bot, hopefully more people will see it. I can’t stand my username being … anymore so I’m moving over to another account <3

https://janitorai.com/profiles/c77fb18f-c29c-40d6-9a8d-c9342be7f52e_profile-of-yeahboyanddollface

here it is if anyone’s interested in following, of course you don’t have to. I’ll keep my bots here public, but I will be making them only on my new account from now on.

pretty boy 🤭 I wanted to make a bot myself cuz Crowe is extremely underrated and he deserves appreciation. This character does not belong to me, nor does tKatb. All credits go to Fantasia/Tealcat.

Edit: I made some changes to the personality section though it'll probably be very subtle/won't change anything about the way the bot interacts with you. I'm struggling so hard with his personality bc all that I really know is that he's nice. So, rn he just seems like a very flat character to me and being kind is like his only personality trait😭if anyone has any tips on how to make him more detailed, I would greatly appreciate it!!

(I also added descriptions of Brittney, Jess, Deryl and Geo so that way the bot hopefully portrays them more accurately if they're mentioned at all.)
